details.strategy: Email blast to existing newsletter subscribers announcing the app launch. Warm audience with high conversion expected.
Paid acquisition to complement organic growth. Small budget ($500) to test channels and messaging before scaling. Focus on install conversion (80%) over awareness (20%).
details.concept: Main angle: 'All your DeFi positions in one place' / '300 dashboards in 1 app'. Position Otomato as the single source of truth for DeFi users who are tired of checking multiple apps.
details.timing: Starts Feb 6 (+5 days after launch) - gives time for organic buzz first
details.campaign_angles:
ANGLE 1: Dashboard Consolidation
- '300 DeFi dashboards. 1 app. Zero setup.'
- '10 tabs open? There's a better way.'
- Target: Power users with complex portfolios

ANGLE 2: Pain Point
- 'Tired of checking Zapper, DeBank, and 5 other apps?'
- 'Your portfolio, unified.'
- Target: Active DeFi users

ANGLE 3: Protection
- 'Know before you get liquidated.'
- 'Sleep while Otomato watches your positions.'
- Target: Leveraged positions / lending users

ANGLE 4: Simplicity
- 'Zero setup. Just paste your wallet.'
- 'No wallet connect. No signatures. Just alerts.'
- Target: Security-conscious users
details.visual_concepts:
VISUAL 1: Split Screen
- Left: Chaos (multiple browser tabs, dashboards)
- Right: Clean Otomato app showing same info

VISUAL 2: Before/After
- Before: Anxious trader checking 10 apps
- After: Calm notification from Otomato

VISUAL 3: App Screenshots
- Clean portfolio view
- Alert example (health factor warning)
- Position detection animation
details.target_audiences:
TWITTER:
- DeFi Twitter followers
- Protocol-specific audiences (AAVE, Hyperliquid users)
- Lookalikes from existing power users

TELEGRAM:
- DeFi group members
- Alpha/trading groups
- Protocol announcement channels

REDDIT:
- r/defi, r/ethfinance, r/cryptocurrency
- Protocol-specific subreddits
- Yield farming communities
details.kpis:
Primary: Cost per Install (CPI) - target <$5
Secondary: CTR - target >1%
Tertiary: Activation rate - target >60%

Success = 100+ installs at <$5 CPI
checklist: Create 3 ad creative variants per angle
Define audience targeting for each platform
Prepare landing page / app store links
Define kill criteria (when to stop underperforming ads)
details.budget_split:
Twitter: $300 (60%)
Telegram: $150 (30%)
Reddit: $50 (10%)

Rationale: Twitter has best DeFi audience, Telegram for crypto natives, Reddit for testing

details.strategy: Co-marketing with supported protocols. Protocol accounts RT our announcement. NOT CONFIRMED - very low priority.
Hand-picked from top 200 Wrapper rankings. Mix of known influencers + high-value wallets. Active feedback loop. THIS IS THE LAUNCH ARMY.
details.timing: Launch Day (Feb 1) - Coordinated posting at 14:00 UTC
checklist: Assign posting times to Power Users volunteers
Prepare FAQ responses for launch day
details.template:
🚀 LAUNCH DAY PLAYBOOK

Timeline (UTC):
- 14:00: Official announcement tweet goes live
- 14:00-16:00: YOU post about the app (your words, authentic)
- 16:00+: Engage with comments, RT each other

DO: Be authentic, share real experience
DON'T: Copy-paste same text, shill aggressively

channels.name: Fundraise Announcement
notes: 2M press reach → 10 crypto media pickups → 1M impressions

details.strategy: MASSIVE impact expected. €2M raised from Improbable.io (Top 20 UK tech, $3B+ valuation, backed by a16z/SoftBank). Video announcement to create awareness.
details.confidential: Amount: €2M raised | Lead investor: Improbable.io | Status: Not yet public

channels.name: Referral Loop
notes: Minimal MVP: share button + invite counter

details.strategy: Minimal referral mechanic. Just a share button in the app + counter showing how many friends you've invited. No rewards, no complexity. Low effort, low expected return.
details.timing: Available at launch, builds over time as user base grows
checklist: Add share button to app (profile or settings)
Generate unique referral link per user

channels.name: All the team PUSH
channels.description: Ask your friend, contact telegram, discord etc to launch otomato

channels.name: Auto-DM New Followers
channels.description: DM people who follow Otomato + founder accounts
notes: Lower conversion than engagers but still warm

details.strategy: Welcome DM to new followers of Otomato and founder accounts. Introduces the app and invites to try it.

notes.text: Growth tools (Roast, Contest, Newsletter) start 10 days after launch
Fundraise announcement PLANNED Feb 20 - major driver (2,700 activated)

project.name: Otomato Growth Model
project.description: User acquisition funnel model for Otomato DeFi Assistant - targeting 5,000 active users by March 2026
